type_header_font.label: Font
type_header_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts).

type_body_font.label: Font
type_body_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts).

paragraph.content: Affects product media (thumbnails, gallery, cards).

font_subheading_style.label: Subheading font
font_subheading_style.info: Applies to promo tags, unit prices, customer account headings, stock status and more. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/25-styles).

home_search_enabled.label: Feature search field on home page

product_swatches.label: Variant options for swatches
product_swatches.info: Use commas to support different options (e.g. Color, Material, Style). [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/131-product).

product_swatches_plural.label: Variant options for swatches (plural)
product_swatches_plural.info: Add the pluralized version of each option in the same order (e.g. Colors, Materials, Styles).

checkbox_options.label: Variant options for checkboxes
checkbox_options.info: Use commas to support different options (e.g. Engraving, Monogramming).

checkbox_options_label.label: Checkbox labels
checkbox_options_label.info: Add the label version of each option in the same order (e.g. Add Engraving, Add Monogramming).

show_rating.label: Show rating
show_rating.info: To display a rating, add a product rating app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/theme-structure/page-types#product-grid-section-settings)

show_countdown.label: Show countdown timer
show_countdown.info: Only displays on hover, will not display on touch devices. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/149-countdown-timer).

uppercase_product_title.label: Product title style
uppercase_product_title.info: Also applies to titles in the cart drawer.

product_tags.label: Promo tags
product_tags.info: Use commas to support different options (e.g. Selling fast, Most wished, Final sale). [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/142-badges).

product_tags_icons.label: Promo tag icons
product_tags_icons.info: Add the name of the icon file of each promo tag in the same order (e.g. icon_lighting, icon_wish, icon_sale). PNG required. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/142-badges).

show_shipping_indicator.label: Show shipping indicator
show_shipping_indicator.info: Show a shipping indicator on the cart page and cart drawer. Configure your [shipping rates ](/admin/settings/shipping) to match the amount.

shipping_indicator_value.label: Free shipping minimum amount
shipping_indicator_value.info: Indicate the value in your store's main currency.

show_gift_wrapping.label: Enable gift wrapping option
show_gift_wrapping.info: Configure a gift wrapping product to enable this option. [Learn more]( https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/145-gift-wrap)

upsell_product_source.label: Upsell product source
upsell_product_source.info: You may configure product upsells in different ways. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/146-product-upsells)

product_upsells_list.label: Product list
product_upsells_list.info: If Product list is selected, you must choose the products you want to show.

paragraph.content: Show currency codes after prices. Example: $1.00 USD.

favicon.label: Favicon image
favicon.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

text.label: Text
text.info: Leave the text blank to hide the announcement bar (maximum 100 characters).

include_margins.label: Make section margins the same as theme

image_after.label: After image
image_after.info: We recommend using the same size for both images.

paragraph.content: To update section settings, visit Theme Settings > Cart.

text.label: Text
text.info: Add to show text instead of an icon.

show_view_all.label: Enable "View all" button if list includes more collections than shown

collection_image.label: Collection image
collection_image.info: Optional. The selected image will be displayed instead of the collection's image. 1080px width recommended.

custom_address.label: Address
custom_address.info: Add a custom address instead the one shown automatically.

paragraph.content: Add social media in Theme Settings below.

response_time.label: Response time
response_time.info: This will appear after the user submits their message.

paragraph.content: To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)
To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)

title.info: Include a heading that explains the content.
title.label: Heading

page.label: Text from page
page.info: Contact forms will not be displayed.

content_align.label: Text alignment
content_align.info: Only applies to large screens. Alignment will be centered on touch devices.

paragraph.content: Time zone follows store setting. To configure, visit [store settings](/admin/settings/general).

custom_liquid.label: Custom Liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

paragraph.content: You can change the title of the FAQ page in the Shopify Page Admin. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/60-faq-page).
Place this section above all collapsible content sections to provide quick links to each section. Collapsible content sections may not have the same title.
To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)

link.label: Link
link.info: Links to image in the slide.

show_view_all.label: Enable "View all" button if blog includes more blog posts than shown
Enable "View all" button if collection has more products than shown

product_list.label: Products
product_list.info: Select any specific products you want displayed instead of the ones shown automatically.

show_vendor.label: Show vendor
show_vendor.info: If enabled, will overwrite short description

short_description.label: Short description
short_description.info: If enabled, will overwrite short description.

paragraph.content: To display timer, add Metafield definition. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/84-create-a-nested-menu-list).

paragraph__1.content: This block displays a product’s promo tags and product ratings.

paragraph__2.content: To display product tags add tags to product [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com).

paragraph__3.content: To display a rating, add a product rating app. [Learn more](https://apps.shopify.com/product-reviews?shpxid=e2a325a7-B569-4A3F-842C-3207F19749CA).

color_swatch_type.label: Swatch type
color_swatch_type.info: To enable variant images, each variant must have an associated image. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/125-color-swatches).

color_swatch_shape.label: Swatch shape
color_swatch_shape.info: Does not apply when default setting is enabled.

show_color_swatches.label: Show swatches
show_color_swatches.info: This theme can show custom images for color swatches. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/125-color-swatches).

show_inventory_notification.label: Show stock status
show_inventory_notification.info: Variants need to have inventory tracking enabled in order for this feature to work.

custom_liquid.label: Custom Liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

custom_address.label: Address
custom_address.info: Add a custom address instead the one shown automatically.

header__1.info: To add a country/region, go to your [payment settings.](/admin/settings/payments)

header__2.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

header__4.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

logo.label: Image
logo.info: Upload your logo at double its size.

logo_position.label: Header layout
logo_position.info: Layout is automatically optimized for mobile.

enable_sticky.label: Enable sticky header
enable_sticky.info: Header is visible on the screen as customers scroll up.

quick_linklist.label: Secondary Menu
quick_linklist.info: The secondary menu on mobile allows the user to quick select common pages like My Account or Returns.

highlight_links.label: Highlight menu titles
highlight_links.info: Use commas to support different links (e.g. Sale, New)

icon_size.label: Icon size
icon_size.info: To display, update the store navigation settings. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/150-navigation-icons).

menu_item.label: Menu item
menu_item.info: Enter a first-level menu item to apply mega menu promotions. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/143-add-mega-menu).

transparent_header.label: Allow transparent header
transparent_header.info: This setting only applies when this section is the first one.

image_size.label: Image width
image_size.info: Based on original size of image. Upload an image double the desired display size for retina screens.

image_below_position.label: Position below section
image_below_position.info: Use to position image when 'Float below section' is selected.

image_horizontal_position.label: Horizontal position
image_horizontal_position.info: Change the position of your image on desktop screens. Smaller screens will keep the default design.

horizontal_position.label: Horizontal content position
horizontal_position.info: Change the position of your text and button on desktop screens. Smaller screens will keep the default design.

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

video_url.label: Video URL
video_url.info: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL.

description.label: Video alt text
description.info: Describe the video to make it accessible for customers using screen readers.

fallback_image.label: Fallback image
fallback_image.info: 1920 x 1080 .jpg recommended. Used when video is not loaded.

horizontal_position.label: Horizontal content position
horizontal_position.info: Change the position of your text and button on desktop screens. Smaller screens will keep the default design.

media_position.label: Video focus area
media_position.info: Used for small screens. Select which part of the video is most important to show.

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

remove_margin.label: Show logo banner section above the fold

row_height.label: Row height
row_height.info: The row height will dynamically fit on mobile devices.

title_on_hover.label: Show image heading on hover only

description_on_hover.label: Show image description on hover only
description_on_hover.info: Only applies to desktop, title and description always visible on touch devices.

video.label: Shopify-hosted video
video.info: Add if you want to show a video instead of an image.

image_animation.label: Media animation
image_animation.info: Parallax enabled only if ‘Overlap text box with image’ is enabled.

paragraph.content: To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)
For best results, we recommend uploading four or more testimonials. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/103-testimonials).
To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)

image.label: Image
image.info: We recommend using an image that has a greater height than your content.

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

social_link.label: Social media platform
social_link.info: Add social media in Theme Settings below.

inner_spacing.label: Card inner spacing
inner_spacing.info: Only applies to desktop. Smaller screens will keep the default design.

paragraph.content: To change the color of logos or icons, please click here to [learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/21-logo-color).

svg_image.label: SVG Image
svg_image.info: Add logos in SVG format to easily change their color. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/136-logo-svg).

parallax.label: Enable parallax
parallax.info: To enable parallax, use an image that is a minimum size of 2688 x 2150. Enabling this feature will disable the image height selection above.

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

paragraph__1.content: If you include a link in social media posts, the page’s featured image will be shown as the preview image. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/images/showing-social-media-thumbnail-images).

paragraph__2.content: A store title and description are included with the preview image. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/promoting-marketing/seo/adding-keywords#set-a-title-and-description-for-your-online-store).

featured_article.label: Select a featured article
featured_article.info: If your store has multiple blogs, the featured article will be the same on all.

paragraph.content: Change excerpts by editing your blog posts. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/blogs/writing-blogs#display-an-excerpt-from-a-blog-post).
To update section settings, visit Theme Settings > Cart.
Add a description or image by editing your collection. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/products/collections/collection-layout).

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

parallax.label: Enable parallax
parallax.info: To enable parallax, use an image that is a minimum size of 2688 x 2150. Enabling this feature will disable the image height selection above.

show_scrim.label: Use text protection layer
show_scrim.info: Darken or lighten your background image so your overlay text is easily legible.

scrim_lightness.label: Text protection layer
scrim_lightness.info: Keep slider at 0 to darken image or slide to lighten image.

show_directions.label: Show directions button
show_directions.info: To activate, add an address below.

map_address.label: Map address
map_address.info: Google Maps will find the exact location.

map_embed.label: Map embed
map_embed.info: Find out how to get a map embed code. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/144-map).

image.label: Image
image.info: Will display if the map does not load. 1440 x 1440px recommended.

paragraph.content: Each email subscription creates a customer account. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers).
Each email subscription creates a customer account. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/customers).

paragraph__1.content: This block displays a product’s promo tags and product ratings.

paragraph__2.content: To display product tags add tags to product [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/142-badges).

paragraph__3.content: To display a rating, add a product rating app. [Learn more](https://apps.shopify.com/product-reviews?shpxid=e2a325a7-B569-4A3F-842C-3207F19749CA).

show_color_swatches.label: Show color swatches
show_color_swatches.info: This theme can show custom images for color swatches. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/125-color-swatches).

show_inventory_notification.label: Show stock status
show_inventory_notification.info: Variants need to have inventory tracking enabled in order for this feature to work.

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout).

custom_liquid.label: Custom Liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

enable_all_images.label: Show images of all colors regardless of variant selected
enable_all_images.info: This option is ideal for merchants with limited images. For merchants with many images per color, click here to [learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/124-product-gallery).

paragraph.content: To show different content for each product, use Metafields. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/117-dynamic-sources-and-metafields)

custom_liquid.label: Custom Liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

paragraph.content: To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)

feature_icon.info: Icons selected from this dropdown will appear on all product pages. For dynamic icons for each product, use the ‘Custom icon’ feature below. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/50-product-features).

scale_value.label: Scale value
scale_value.info: Please add a number from 0 to 100.

paragraph.content: To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit [this link](https://fontawesome.com/icons)

care_icon.info: Icons selected from this dropdown will appear on all product pages. For dynamic icons for each product, use the ‘Custom icon’ feature below. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/54-care-instructions).

featured_image_info.content: If you include a link in social media posts, the page’s featured image will be shown as the preview image. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/images/showing-social-media-thumbnail-images).

title_info.content: A store title and description are included with the preview image. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/promoting-marketing/seo/adding-keywords#set-a-title-and-description-for-your-online-store).

column_values.label: Column values
column_values.info: Use commas to separate the value of each column (e.g. XS, S, M, L).

note.label: Note
note.info: Add a note to specify the measurement units.

paragraph.content: To select complementary products, add the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

paragraph__1.content: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/themes/development/recommended-products).

product.label: Product
product.info: Product displayed in Quick Shop modal.

color_swatch_type.label: Swatch type
color_swatch_type.info: To enable variant images, each variant must have an associated image. [Learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/125-color-swatches).

color_swatch_shape.label: Swatch shape
color_swatch_shape.info: Does not apply when default setting is enabled.

column_values.label: Column values
column_values.info: Use commas to separate the value of each column (e.g. XS, S, M, L).

color_4.label: Text color 4
color_4.info: Select different colors per letter, only applied to layout A.

paragraph.content: Background and background image only applied to Layout B.

social_link.label: Social media platform
social_link.info: Add social media in Theme Settings below.

video_embed.label: Video embed
video_embed.info: Add if you want to show an embedded video instead. [learn more](https://archer-commerce.helpscoutdocs.com/article/111-multi-video-block).

image.label: Image
image.info: Add if you want to show an image instead of a video.

video_link.label: Link
video_link.info: Used for hosted video or image.
